top_signals.title: Bitcoin DeFi demand concentrated in small-but-deep pockets, Rootstock exec says
top_signals.summary: DeFi liquidity is down, with total value locked dropping from roughly $180 billion to $70 billion in less than a year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Greenland Mines adds midstream resource exposure with $3.7M investment in AnorTech
top_signals.summary: The transaction provides a differentiated critical materials and processing platform, rather than simply a passive equity position, Greenland Mines said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Congo, Belgium agree on transfer of colonial-era geological records
top_signals.summary: These records, housed at the Royal Museum for Central Africa, are said to contain decades of geological surveys, maps, drill logs and exploration reports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Man with possible tokuryū ties arrested over mobile payment fraud
top_signals.summary: The man reportedly told police he got involved in the scheme when he applied for a job a few years ago after seeing a recruitment notice on X.

top_signals.title: Rare Earths Americas hits 44.5% TREO at Shiloh project in Georgia
top_signals.summary: The company is focused on heavy rare earth elements used in permanent magnets and defense applications.

top_signals.title: Rare earth refiner gets $500M loan from Pentagon to build ‘Freedom Facility’
top_signals.summary: The commitment is part of a roughly $1 billion initiative to expand US capacity to separate and produce rare earths.
